intended_use: Research-use bilateral, continuously age-adjusted anatomical rarity screening, including a secondary AL-conditioned geometry discordance score; not a refractive prediction model.
selection_rule: Use Extended when both WTW and CCT are valid; otherwise use Core.

models.model_name: Biometry OOD bilateral continuous age-adjusted Core
models.cohort_status: Single-center bilateral institutional eye reference with patient-level splits; clinical indication is not verified by EMR.

AL.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

Mean_K.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

ACD.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

LT.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

models.covariance_method: Eye-level reweighted Minimum Covariance Determinant after patient-level split; support_fraction 0.75; eigenvalue floor 1e-8 of maximum eigenvalue
models.calibration_method: Patient-held-out bilateral age-local empirical calibration; Gaussian age kernel bandwidth 8 years selected in a separate tuning set; add-one upper-tail smoothing; cluster-aware effective N

al_conditional_geometry.method: Conditional robust Gaussian geometry using the covariance Schur complement; AL is conditioned on after continuous age standardization and is excluded from the conditional distance
al_conditional_geometry.calibration_method: Patient-held-out bilateral age-and-AL-local empirical calibration; joint Gaussian kernel bandwidths 8 years and 1 standardized AL; add-one upper-tail smoothing; cluster-aware effective N

models.threshold_interpretation: Prespecified descriptive categories, not clinical decision thresholds.

models.model_name: Biometry OOD bilateral continuous age-adjusted Extended
models.cohort_status: Single-center bilateral institutional eye reference with patient-level splits; clinical indication is not verified by EMR.

AL.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

ACD.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

LT.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

WTW.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

CCT.scale_method: Linear interpolation of MAD scales from 250 nearest-age derivation patients

models.covariance_method: Eye-level reweighted Minimum Covariance Determinant after patient-level split; support_fraction 0.75; eigenvalue floor 1e-8 of maximum eigenvalue
models.calibration_method: Patient-held-out bilateral age-local empirical calibration; Gaussian age kernel bandwidth 4 years selected in a separate tuning set; add-one upper-tail smoothing; cluster-aware effective N

al_conditional_geometry.method: Conditional robust Gaussian geometry using the covariance Schur complement; AL is conditioned on after continuous age standardization and is excluded from the conditional distance
al_conditional_geometry.calibration_method: Patient-held-out bilateral age-and-AL-local empirical calibration; joint Gaussian kernel bandwidths 8 years and 1 standardized AL; add-one upper-tail smoothing; cluster-aware effective N

models.threshold_interpretation: Prespecified descriptive categories, not clinical decision thresholds.
